legacyInventoryExcluded.reason: Predates this production pipeline and has not passed the new seeded-composition gate.

activeLegacyUpgrades.uniqueFantasy: stormline recovery operator climbing a broken summit relay
activeLegacyUpgrades.pressureLoop: stamina, fall pressure, carried signal cargo, and rest-anchor recovery
activeLegacyUpgrades.objective: deliver recovered anchor signal cargo to the summit
activeLegacyUpgrades.visualIdentity: cyan rescue geometry, amber climber, signal particles, and dark industrial cliff
activeLegacyUpgrades.interactionStructure: continuous action canvas with first-screen hero controls and one advanced disclosure
activeLegacyUpgrades.validation: Playwright carried the Signal Cut shortcut through Fork Relay into four Stormlock reel-time pressure pulses, showed the authoritative pressure meter fall from the retained charge to 25 percent at pulse 2 of 4 and zero at lock, continued through Cacheline and the 175-cargo Windglass score, proved real failure and keyboard retry, checked Advanced closed/open/closed, held bounded DOM/canvas/descriptor/scene counts, passed the matched performance and Human View gates, and reported zero console messages.
